meaning: n.英国中部的都市,英国的大赛马会(1780年德贝伯爵所创立,每年六月的第一个星期三在London附近Epsom举行,参赛马龄平均为三岁,这天称为Derby Day),赛马会
examples: Arazi is odds-on to win the Kentucky Derby.
The Derby will be run in spite of the bad weather.
He caught a 6 pound salmon in the annual fishing derby at Lake Winnipesaukee.
The paintings will be displayed at the Derby Museum and Art Gallery on The Strand, Derby.
Authorized's victory ended a long Derby wait for Dettori, 36, dating back to 1992.
